summary: Tested QuickGig full-stack: 38/38 backend pytest cases passed (auth, ID verify, jobs incl. distance filter & search, accept/complete, conversations, messages, reviews+rating recalc, admin login/users/ban/unban/stats/conversations/chat-view/change-password). Frontend smoke: welcome → register → verify-id (with skip) → tabs (BROWSE/POST/INBOX/ME) all render with correct testIDs; unverified users get the 'Verify ID first' gate on POST and verify-CTA on profile. Logout → /welcome. Login of unverified user correctly routes to verify-id. Admin route /admin loads, login succeeds, /admin/dashboard shows all 4 tabs (stats/users/chats/settings) with live data.

issues: Console warnings: deprecated 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow on web), props.pointerEvents deprecated. Cosmetic only — does not affect function but worth migrating for RN web cleanliness.

Geolocation auto-denied in headless preview shows 'Location denied — distance filter disabled'. Expected on web; on real mobile device GPS will be granted. Distance filter logic verified via backend tests.

action_items: (Optional polish) Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow on web/migrate to RN 0.76 boxShadow API to silence console warnings.
(Optional) Replace props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents in any TouchableOpacity wrappers to remove deprecation warning.
ID verification is intentionally MOCKED — any uploaded image instantly sets is_verified=true (per spec). This is documented and expected, not a bug.

Frontend e2e of verified-user flow (post job, accept, chat) was NOT tested via Playwright because expo-image-picker requires a real file selection on web; backend pytest fully exercises this path end-to-end and passes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~700 lines — still single-file but acceptable for current scope; consider splitting routers (auth/jobs/messages/admin) if it grows.

Admin seed correctly preserves password if admin user already exists (per /app/auth_testing.md guideline) but only ensures role=admin; if ADMIN_PASSWORD is changed in .env it will NOT update existing admin password (intentional, password is changeable from panel).
haversine + post-query filtering is fine for current scale but won't scale to 10k+ jobs; future improvement is MongoDB 2dsphere geo index.
Reviews recompute average by loading ALL reviews into memory — fine for now, may be issue at scale.
All endpoints exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} — clean.
JWT secret loaded from env, bcrypt hashes start with $2b$ (verified via login flow), no plaintext storage.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed users + jobs each run; admin seeded automatically by backend startup. No cleanup needed for this iteration; admin password change test self-restores.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_quickgig_api.py — 38 tests covering full flow incl. admin. Run: `cd /app/backend && pytest tests/ -v`. Public URL via EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Admin creds: admin@quickgig.app / admin123 (in /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Tab routes: /browse /post /messages /profile (use href selectors `a[href="/post"]` for tab navigation in playwright since tabs are rendered as anchor links in expo-router web). Verify-id submit is disabled until idImage is uploaded — use [data-testid="skip-verify"] for unverified browse-only flow when ImagePicker can't be triggered headless.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All requested features work as specified.
